name: Eagle's Eye Golf : Master the Greens

reviews.review_description: I purchased this game a few days ago and I’m not able to switch the clubs to right handed clubs, since I am right handed.  There’s is no tutorial to help me know how to do this. The clubs that you can pick from is left handed clubs. My name is Bonnie Mazzola. Can you please help me so I can enjoy this game? thank you so much.

You can't barely figure out the controls because there is no tutorial, the hotboxes are janky, would be a higher rating if they didn't take after activision and finished there game before the posted it on the store...

developer_response.body:
As per your feedback, we have added the Tutorial and UI has been upgraded. Please update the game and enjoy. For any issues or queries, kindly send an email to salesandservice@biswagames.com

Thank you again for helping us make our game better for everyone!
